---
title: "Tutorials"
sidebar: tutorials
toc: false
title-block-banner: "#445599"
listing:
  id: tutorials-listings
  contents: 
    - tutorials
  sort: "date desc"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.quarto-title-block .quarto-title-banner {
    background: #2A7B9B;
    background-image:
        url("/images/blue-square-bg.svg"),
        linear-gradient(90deg, #469cd6 0%, #0c29ad 100%);
    background-repeat: no-repeat, no-repeat;
    background-size: 50% auto, cover;
    background-position: right, center;
    opacity: 0;
    animation: fadeInBanner 0.2s ease-in forwards;
}
@keyframes fadeInBanner {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
    }
}

.sidebar-item .menu-text {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: bold;
}

#title-block-header h1 {
    color: white;
    font-size: 50px;
}
</style>
```

::: {#tutorials-listings}
:::
